sentence_reviews.text: A Gaussian process places a probability distribution over functions and uses a kernel to couple observations, interpolate predictions, and quantify posterior uncertainty.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process and Bayesian nonparametric / kernel topics; Deep Learning kernel-method background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Distribution over functions, kernels, prediction, and posterior uncertainty are directly characteristic of GPs.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Kernels & implicit feature maps, Bayesian & approximate inference.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Gaussian processes is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Kernels & implicit feature maps.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process covariance kernels; Deep Learning kernel-method background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Kernels/covariance functions are central to GPs.

sentence_reviews.text: Gaussian processes consumes, emits, or organizes information using Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML Gaussian process posterior predictive distributions and Bayesian uncertainty topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Uncertainty distributions are central to GP prediction.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Gaussian processes is modeled as depending on Kernels & implicit feature maps, Bayesian & approximate inference and feeding downstream nodes such as Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection, Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.

GPs represent distributions over functions and posterior uncertainty; represents_with/common is supported, though core could also be justified.
